headline: Welcome
intro:
You are welcome here, whether you are new to Buddhism, new to meditation,
returning after time away, or simply curious.
primary_body: You do not need to identify as Buddhist, have prior experience, or wear special clothing. Chairs, cushions, and blankets are available.
sangha_body: A sangha is a community of practice. We come together to learn, sit, listen, ask questions, and support one another on the path.
location: UNITY OF EAU CLAIRE - 1808 Folsom St, Eau Claire, WI

schedule.text: Dharma talk, Buddhist teaching, or discussion

arrival_body: If you arrive after 7:00, please enter quietly and take any open seat. Chairs are available. Large cushions are under the table inside the hall; small cushions and blankets are in the closet.
qr_body: Scan for updates, weekly meeting notes, and community announcements.
dana_note: We operate on dana, the Buddhist practice of generosity. There is no set fee for attendance.
